name: Expedited Review of Jeopardy Assessments

eligibility.description: Taxpayers subject to emergency 'jeopardy' or 'termination' assessments who act within 30 days of the assessment notice.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a mechanism to force the IRS to abate unreasonable assessments or release levies made without the standard 30-day notice through administrative and judicial review.
